# Domain Pack Candidate Template

Status: Candidate / Template / No Runtime

```yaml
Domain_Pack:
  name:
  status: "Candidate"
  use_as:
  do_not_use_as:
  open_core_chain:
    Source:
    Carrier:
    Authority:
    Gate:
    Action:
    Return:
    Rebuild:
  core_red_doors: []
  first_candidate_files: []
  evidence_boundary:
  needs_human_decision: []
```

## Rule

A domain pack is a projection of Open Core into a specific field. It is not an Open Core requirement.
